## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.55

### Camera WebRTC
- Waits for the real X-Sense camera peer before sending the native Home Assistant WebRTC SDP offer.
- Resets the SDP offer attempt when the camera peer leaves before an SDP answer, so the next camera peer event can retry within the same stream attempt.
- Reconnects the X-Sense signal socket within the existing startup timeout when the socket closes before an SDP answer.

### Debug Logging
- Adds compact counters for SDP offer attempts and signal reconnects.
- Adds safe diagnostics for offer resets, skipped offer sends, queued ICE candidates, and forwarded ICE candidates.
- Keeps SDP, ICE candidates, ticket signatures, tokens, and full serial numbers out of debug logs.
